tools.name: hood_basis_snapshot
tools.description:
Robinhood Chain tokenized hisselerin guncel basis (prim/iskonto) goruntusu.
    Her ticker icin: chainlink_px (on-chain fiyat), ref_last (NASDAQ), basis_bps
    (+ = token primli), overnight_bps (son kapanisa gore gecelik hareket),
    oracle_paused bayragi.

tools.name: hood_basis_history
tools.description:
Bir ticker'in dakikalik basis gecmisi (en yeni once). Ornek ticker: NVDA,
    TSLA, SPY. limit max 5000.

tools.name: hood_gaps_summary
tools.description:
Tum ticker'lar icin gecelik (overnight) ve hafta sonu (weekend) prim/iskonto
    istatistikleri: ortalama, min/max, son deger (bps). Token 24/5 islem gordugu
    icin NASDAQ kapaliyken olusan sapmayi olcer.

tools.name: hood_gaps_live
tools.description:
Su anki off-hours seansin canli goruntusu: hangi ticker son kapanisa gore
    en cok primli/iskontolu. Piyasa aciksa 'regular' doner.

tools.name: hood_gap_sessions
tools.description: Bir ticker'in seans-bazli gap gecmisi (her gece / hafta sonu ayri satir).

tools.name: hood_feeds
tools.description:
Robinhood Chain'de izlenen tum tokenized hisse ve kripto feed'lerinin
    registry'si (Chainlink proxy + token kontrat adresleri).

tools.name: reddit_alpha_signals
tools.description:
Reddit'ten cikarilan ticker alpha sinyalleri (novelty, mention velocity,
    cross-sub spread bilesenleri). signal_type: ticker_alpha|crowded_trade|
    event_mispricing|squeeze_watch. tickers virgullu (NVDA,TSLA).

tools.name: reddit_market_regime
tools.description:
Reddit sohbetinden cikarilan guncel piyasa rejimi (orn. mag7_only_rally,
    risk_on_call_chase) + confidence + izlenecek bayraklar.

tools.name: hood_attention
tools.description:
Hood tokenized hisseler icin Reddit dikkat/alpha skoru x canli basis
    birlesimi: hangi token'da sosyal ilgi VE on-chain prim/iskonto ayni anda var.
    Fan-out (ayni post cok ticker) tekillestirilmis.

tools.name: hood_pools
tools.description:
Izlenen Uniswap (Hood) havuzlari: token'in havuz fiyati, likidite (USD) ve
    Chainlink oracle fiyatina gore sapma (dev_bps). 5 dk'da bir guncellenir.

tools.name: oracle_deviation
tools.description:
Chainlink-vs-Uniswap havuz fiyati sapmasi (bps, mutlak degere gore sirali).
    status: ok (<100), warning (100-500), alert (>500). Dusuk likiditeli
    havuzlarda buyuk sapma normaldir — liquidity_usd alanina bak.

tools.name: stable_risk
tools.description: USDG ve diger stablecoin'lerin $1 pariteden sapmasi (depeg riski, bps).

tools.name: market_events
tools.description:
Makine-okur haber olaylari (kripto + hisse). symbols virgullu (NVDA,BTC),
    event_type: listing|hack|regulation|earnings|etf|partnership|macro|
    liquidation|stablecoin|general. importance 0-100.

tools.name: token_flows
tools.description:
Buyuk on-chain token transferleri (whale akislari): 32 stock token + USDG,
    USD esiginin ustundekiler. direction: mint|burn|transfer. Mint/burn,
    tokenize hisse arzinin degistigini gosterir (issuance/redemption).

tools.name: flow_summary
tools.description:
Ticker bazinda whale akis ozeti: transfer sayisi, toplam USD hacim,
    mint/burn USD (arz degisimi), en buyuk transfer.

tools.name: chain_stats
tools.description:
Robinhood Chain deploy istatistikleri: gunluk deploy/token sayilari,
    top deployer'lar, toplam kontrat/verified sayilari (Ottoscan analytics).

tools.name: chain_deployments
tools.description:
Robinhood Chain'de yeni kontrat deploylari (Ottoscan; genesis'ten bugune
    tam tarihce). tokens_only=True ile sadece yeni token kontratlari.

labels.name: chain_stats
labels.description:
Robinhood Chain deploy istatistikleri: gunluk deploy/token sayilari,
    top deployer'lar, toplam kontrat/verified sayilari (Ottoscan analytics).

labels.name: chain_deployments
labels.description:
Robinhood Chain'de yeni kontrat deploylari (Ottoscan; genesis'ten bugune
    tam tarihce). tokens_only=True ile sadece yeni token kontratlari.

labels.name: service_status
labels.description:
Trust status of the Otto data layer: per-feed freshness (age_sec/stale),
    24h tick coverage, NASDAQ reference availability and oracle-pause count.
    Call before making trading decisions — status: ok|degraded|down.

labels.name: chain_stats
labels.description:
Robinhood Chain deployment statistics: daily deploy/token counts, top
    deployers, total contract/verified counts (Ottoscan analytics).

labels.name: chain_deployments
labels.description:
New contract deployments on Robinhood Chain (Ottoscan; full history
    since genesis). tokens_only=True returns only new token contracts.

labels.name: gap_trade_signals
labels.description:
Deterministic signals for the gap-trader strategy: per Hood ticker the
    overnight gap it currently carries (bps), a signal (long_at_open |
    avoid_or_reduce | none), 14-day gap statistics, the hit rate of pre-open
    gap direction vs open direction (hit_rate_14d) and risk flags
    (oracle_pau

labels.name: perp_funding
labels.description:
Hourly funding rates on tokenized-stock perps (Arcus + Lighter). Without
    params: latest value per venue+ticker pair (funding_apr_pct = annualized
    %). With ticker: history. Tokens trade 24/7 while the stock market does
    not — weekend/overnight funding is the price of that mismatch.

labels.name: perp_spot_basis
labels.description:
Perp mark price vs Hood on-chain spot (Chainlink per-share + pool),
    deviation in bps per ticker. A large |perp_vs_chainlink_bps| means the
    perp and spot price the same stock differently — a cross-venue opportunity
    or a stale-oracle signal. Fields are null for markets without a Hood spot.

labels.name: funding_carry_signals
labels.description:
Deterministic funding-carry candidates joining perp funding
    (Arcus/Lighter) with perp-vs-spot basis. Per ticker: funding rate +
    annualized funding_apr_pct, perp-vs-Chainlink gap (bps) and a label —
    carry_long_spot_short_perp (hold Hood spot, short the perp, collect
    positive funding),

labels.name: narrative_trade_signals
labels.description:
Deterministic candidates for the narrative-trader strategy: per Hood
    ticker the highest-alpha Reddit signal (alpha_score, evidence, themes), a
    signal bias (long_candidate = rising attention | avoid_or_fade = crowded
    trade | context = regime info), live Chainlink price, basis and risk

labels.name: hood_quote
labels.description:
Minimal fast quote for one Hood ticker: Chainlink price (token +
    per-share), NASDAQ references (ref_last, ref_prev_close), basis/overnight
    bps, the most liquid pool's price/liquidity/deviation and
    oracle_paused/stale flags. Use for sizing and fill pricing instead of
    pulling the full

labels.name: hood_ticker_brief
labels.description:
One-call brief for a single Hood ticker: live quote (price, basis,
    pool, risk flags), research card (rating/score/thesis/catalysts), earnings
    risk, sector rotation context, best Reddit attention signal, 24h
    whale-flow summary and recent tagged news. Replaces 6-7 separate tool
    calls w

labels.name: agent_position_book
labels.description:
Server-side derived open (paper) position book for a trading agent:
    every order_filled event without a later matching position_closed on the
    same ticker counts as open, joined with the live Chainlink price for
    unrealized P&L (bps and USD). Replaces rebuilding the book from raw
    agent

labels.name: agent_performance
labels.description:
Realized paper-trading performance for an agent, derived from
    position_closed events: trade count, win rate, total/average P&L (bps),
    total P&L (USD), average holding hours, per-ticker breakdown and the last
    20 closed trades. agent: gap-trader | narrative-trader.

labels.name: report_agent_status
labels.description:
Status report from a trading agent — the live panel on
    ottodata.app/agents renders this stream. kind: run_started | signals |
    order_proposed | order_approved | order_filled | order_skipped |
    position_closed | run_summary | error. agent: gap-trader |
    narrative-trader. key: the operato

description:
Execute a REAL on-chain swap on Robinhood Chain via the Rialto router,
    signed by Otto's server-side trading wallet. side=buy spends `usd_amount`
    USDG to buy the ticker's Hood token; side=sell sells `qty` tokens back to
    USDG. The server enforces hard guardrails independently of the caller
